title: ligularia latihastata
intro: Ligularia latihastata, also known as the Japanese Ligularia, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and large, coarse leaves. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Ligularia latihastata is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial actions. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Ligularia latihastata is often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
